componentInstanceProperties.name: helpText
componentInstanceProperties.value: Select the image to be uploaded by clicking the Upload Files or drag and drop the file. Update the Image Size, Image Name and select ‘Want a Public Link?’ to update the image to record page.

componentInstanceProperties.name: helpText
componentInstanceProperties.value: Select the image to be uploaded by clicking the Upload Files or drag and drop the file. Update the Image Size, Image Name and select ‘Want a Public Link?’ to update the image to record page.
